# AZALPLUS - LLMs.txt
# Documentation for AI assistants and language models
# https://azalplus.fr/llms.txt

## About AZALPLUS

AZALPLUS is a French No-Code ERP platform that generates complete business management systems from simple YAML configuration files. The platform is designed for SMBs and is completely free to use.

## Company Information

- Name: AZALPLUS
- Website: https://azalplus.fr
- App: https://app.azalplus.fr
- Country: France
- Language: French (primary), English (supported)
- Pricing: FREE (100% gratuit)

## Business Model

AZALPLUS follows a unique "ERP gratuit" (free ERP) model:
- The ERP software is completely free
- Revenue comes from financial flow services (payments, invoicing)
- No hidden costs, no feature limitations

## Products & Services

### 1. No-Code ERP Generator
- Define business modules in simple YAML files
- Automatic generation of:
  - PostgreSQL database tables
  - REST API endpoints
  - User interface (HTML/CSS)
  - Validation rules
  - Workflow automation
  - RBAC permissions

### 2. Pre-built Business Modules (67 modules)
- CRM (Clients, Contacts, Prospects)
- Sales (Devis, Factures, Commandes)
- Inventory (Produits, Stock, Mouvements)
- HR (Employes, Conges, Temps)
- Projects (Projets, Taches, Interventions)
- Accounting (Comptabilite, Ecritures)
- And many more...

### 3. Key Features
- Multi-tenant architecture
- RGPD/GDPR compliant
- Electronic signatures
- PDF generation
- Email integration
- AI-powered autocompletion (SIRET, addresses)
- Workflow engine
- Real-time dashboards

## Technical Stack

- Backend: Python 3.11, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0
- Database: PostgreSQL 16
- Cache: Redis 7
- Auth: JWT + Argon2 + 2FA (TOTP)
- PDF: WeasyPrint
- AI: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude

## Security

- WAF (Web Application Firewall) built-in
- SQL injection protection
- XSS protection
- Rate limiting
- IP blocking
- Encrypted data at rest
- HTTPS everywhere

## API

Base URL: https://api.azalplus.fr/api/v1

Endpoints (auto-generated per module):
- GET /{module} - List with pagination
- GET /{module}/{id} - Get by ID
- POST /{module} - Create
- PUT /{module}/{id} - Update
- DELETE /{module}/{id} - Delete
- POST /{module}/bulk - Bulk operations
- GET /{module}/export - Export CSV/JSON

## Contact

- Website: https://azalplus.fr
- Email: contact@azalplus.fr

## Keywords

ERP gratuit, No-Code, gestion entreprise, PME, TPE, facturation, CRM, devis, factures, stock, comptabilite, France, SaaS, multi-tenant, RGPD
